name: cashsnap_webgl_background_banks_v1
description: Review registry for WebGL table/background texture banks. Trainable-candidate renders may only use accepted banks; proof-only banks are smoke/diagnostic evidence, not production training data.

banks.blocker: too small and low-variety for trainable background claims

banks.review_basis: Codex visual audit of contact_sheet.jpg found visible banknote fragments/text plus unrelated outdoor/vehicle/skin contexts.
banks.blocker: do not use as a clean WebGL background source

banks.review_basis: Codex visual audit of contact_sheet.jpg found mixed outdoor/vertical-surface patches, black speckled mask artifacts, and a likely note-edge crop.
banks.blocker: do not use as a clean WebGL background source

banks.review_basis: Codex visual audit of contact_sheet.jpg found many banknotes, coins, and people in the patch bank.
banks.blocker: do not use as a clean WebGL background source

banks.review_basis: Codex visual audit of contact_sheet.jpg found banknote fragments/text, outdoor patches, and cluttered non-table contexts.
banks.blocker: do not use as a clean WebGL background source

banks.review_basis: Codex visual audit of contact_sheet.jpg found outdoor/rail/arm/vertical-surface contexts unsuitable as clean table textures.
banks.blocker: do not use as a clean WebGL background source

banks.review_basis: model.md notes visible hands/note fragments/grass in the contact sheet
